metadata.name: Jax Brewery Guide
metadata.description: Curated brewery dataset with weekly schedules, vibes, live tap links, and review platform links
metadata.coverage_area: Jacksonville, Jacksonville Beach, Atlantic Beach, Neptune Beach, Springfield, San Marco, Riverside, Murray Hill, Mandarin, Southside, Fernandina Beach/Amelia Island, St. Augustine
metadata.notes: Phase 1 — curated dataset from web research. Breweries marked as permanently closed have been excluded. Hours and events may change; verify before visiting.

breweries.name: Intuition Ale Works
breweries.known_for: Jacksonville's OG craft brewery. Small-batch handcrafted ales in the historic Doro District next to the Baseball Grounds. Brewery tours available hourly.
breweries.food: Food trucks on rotation
breweries.events: Brewery tours, live events, community gatherings
breweries.tap_highlights: Rotating small-batch ales, seasonal releases

breweries.name: Bold City Brewery — Downtown
breweries.known_for: One of Jacksonville's legacy breweries. Known for Killer Whale Cream Ale and Duke's Cold Nose Brown Ale.
breweries.food: No food at downtown location
breweries.events: Game day events, seasonal releases
breweries.tap_highlights: Killer Whale Cream Ale, Duke's Cold Nose Brown Ale, Mad Manatee IPA

breweries.name: Bold City Brewery — Riverside
breweries.known_for: The production facility & original HQ. 16+ year institution with full kitchen.
breweries.food: Full kitchen on site — burgers, apps, pub fare
breweries.events: Live music, food specials, seasonal releases
breweries.tap_highlights: Full Bold City lineup plus production-only exclusives

breweries.name: Aardwolf Brewing Company
breweries.known_for: Housed in a 1927 ice factory in San Marco. Famous for bourbon barrel-aged beers. 20+ brews on tap at any time.
breweries.food: Permanent food truck on site
breweries.events: Themed weeks, barrel-aged beer releases, special events
breweries.tap_highlights: Bourbon barrel-aged stouts, rotating 20+ tap selection

breweries.name: Wicked Barley Brewing Company
breweries.known_for: Waterfront beer garden with boat dock on Goodby's Creek. Gastropub-style food. 18+ house beers, ciders, and meads on tap.
breweries.food: Full gastropub kitchen — burgers, salads, sandwiches, shareable apps
breweries.events: Live bands, trivia, food & beer pairing events
breweries.tap_highlights: 18+ house-brewed beers, ciders, meads. Rotating seasonals.

breweries.name: Engine 15 Brewing Co.
breweries.address: 1500 Beach Blvd, Ste 217, Jacksonville Beach, FL 32250
breweries.known_for: Jacksonville Beach staple with 5-barrel brewhouse and 50 tap lines. Excellent pub food — smoked meats, brisket, short ribs.
breweries.food: Full pub menu — smoked BLTs, brisket, braised short ribs
breweries.events: Live music, beer releases, community events
breweries.tap_highlights: 50 tap lines, many pouring Engine 15 originals

breweries.name: Southern Swells Brewing Co.
breweries.known_for: Hazy IPAs, lagers, inspired seasonals. 7,500 sq ft taproom plus patio. Also at The Block Jax with Kanine Social dog park.
breweries.food: Snacks (popcorn, chips); pop-up food vendors at events. BYOF friendly.
breweries.events: Craft beer bingo, local crafter markets, pop-up food events
breweries.tap_highlights: Hazy IPAs, crispy lagers, seasonal rotating taps

breweries.name: Green Room Brewing
breweries.known_for: Jax Beach's first microbrewery. Surf-inspired vibe with 16 house drafts. Live music, trivia, run club.
breweries.food: Vegetarian options, delivery and takeout available
breweries.events: Tuesday & Thursday trivia, Wednesday run club, weekend live music, games in the back
breweries.tap_highlights: 16 house-made drafts

breweries.name: Hyperion Brewing Company
breweries.known_for: Jacksonville's first nano brewery. Cultural hub of Springfield — live music, comedy, art gallery, storytelling open mics. The Helios Beer Garden out back is a hidden gem.
breweries.food: Food available on-site
breweries.events: Live music, stand-up comedy, storytelling open mics, art exhibitions
breweries.tap_highlights: Small-batch rotating taps, custom spice blends from Avondale

breweries.name: Strings Sports Brewery — Springfield
breweries.known_for: Family-friendly sports bar brewery. Smoked chicken wings, burgers, BBQ. Dog treats for pups. Also has a Jax Beach location.
breweries.food: Full kitchen — wings, burgers, sandwiches, tacos, BBQ
breweries.events: Game day watch parties, live sports on multiple screens
breweries.tap_highlights: House craft beers paired with sports bar vibes

breweries.name: Strings Sports Brewery — Jax Beach
breweries.known_for: Second location of Strings at Jax Beach. Same great sports brewery vibes, food, and dog-friendly policy.
breweries.food: Full kitchen — wings, burgers, BBQ
breweries.events: Game day watch parties, live sports
breweries.tap_highlights: House craft beers

breweries.name: Tepeyolot Cerveceria
breweries.known_for: Aztec-inspired brewpub with authentic Mexican tacos, street corn, esquites. Unique cultural vibe in San Marco East.
breweries.food: Full kitchen — authentic Mexican tacos, street corn, esquite, appetizers
breweries.events: Happy hour specials, seasonal beer releases
breweries.tap_highlights: Mexican-inspired craft lagers and ales, seasonal specials

breweries.name: Voodoo Brewing Co. — Jacksonville
breweries.known_for: PA-based chain's Jax outpost. Elevated pub food menu, great bar games. Top-rated on TripAdvisor.
breweries.food: Full elevated pub food menu — classic fare crafted to pair with their beers
breweries.events: Seasonal specials, beer pairing dinners
breweries.tap_highlights: Hop-forward IPAs, malty ambers, stouts, wide rotating lineup

breweries.name: Ruby Beach Brewing
breweries.known_for: Downtown's go-to brewpub. 18 rotating house beers brewed on-site plus guest ciders, meads, and spirits.
breweries.food: Ruby Beach Smoke food truck open 7 days a week
breweries.events: Live music, downtown events, seasonal releases
breweries.tap_highlights: 18 rotating house-brewed drafts, guest ciders & meads

breweries.name: King Maker Brewing
breweries.known_for: Craft ales, lagers, ciders, meads. Has a glass blowing studio — you can get blown glass beer mugs. Biergarten vibes. Kid-friendly with icy pops.
breweries.food: El Cubano permanent food truck
breweries.events: Glass blowing events, food truck lineups, biergarten gatherings
breweries.tap_highlights: Craft ales, lagers, ciders, meads

breweries.name: Legacy Ale Works
breweries.address: 14965 Old St Augustine Rd, Jacksonville, FL 32258
breweries.known_for: Mandarin's neighborhood brewpub. Full food menu with vegan/vegetarian options. Family-friendly outdoor courtyard. Live music every Friday.
breweries.food: Full pub-style kitchen — vegan & vegetarian options available
breweries.events: Live music every Friday, family-friendly events, beer pairing dinners
breweries.tap_highlights: House ales, seasonal rotating selection, beer dinners

breweries.name: Veterans United Craft Brewery
breweries.known_for: Veteran-owned brewery with strong community vibe. Themed nights every day of the week. BYOF welcome.
breweries.food: Basic pub snacks (pretzels, mozzarella sticks). Food trucks on select days. BYOF welcome.
breweries.events: Tue: Crowler Specials, Wed: Trivia, Thu: Small Batch Night, Fri: Live Music, Sat: Tours, Sun: Televised Games
breweries.tap_highlights: Rotating small-batch brews, weekly specials

breweries.name: Reve Brewing
breweries.known_for: Neighborhood brewery gem with Bones Pizza inside. Stouts, imperials, sours. Weekly beer slushies. Conversation pits, ping pong, kid play area.
breweries.food: Bones Pizza — wood-fired pizza, vegan options, full menu
breweries.events: Beer slushie days, community events, seasonal releases
breweries.tap_highlights: Stouts, imperial ales, sours, beer slushies

breweries.name: Ink Factory Brewing
breweries.known_for: Brewery meets coffee shop (opens at 8AM!). Smash burger truck. Arcade games, inflatable movie screen, live art events.
breweries.food: Smash burger food truck on site (opens 11AM)
breweries.events: Rat Town Beach Bash, live art, skate demos, movie nights, live music
breweries.tap_highlights: House-brewed craft beers, specialty releases

breweries.name: Fishweir Brewing Company
breweries.known_for: Murray Hill's local taproom. Clean, locally inspired beers. Wine, kombucha, cheese flights, pretzels. Wednesday farmers market.
breweries.food: Cheese flights, pretzels, light snacks. Wed farmers market 4-8PM.
breweries.events: Wednesday farmers market (4-8PM), community events
breweries.tap_highlights: Clean, approachable craft beers, kombucha on tap

breweries.name: Myrtle Avenue Brewing
breweries.known_for: Railyard District brewery with spacious biergarten. Kid play area. Dog-friendly indoor and outdoor. Live music Thursdays.
breweries.food: Food trucks and pop-up vendors
breweries.events: Live music every Thursday, food truck pop-ups
breweries.tap_highlights: Rotating craft beer selection

breweries.name: Historically Hoppy Brewing Company
breweries.known_for: Feels like a giant living room — communal tables, sofas, TVs, bookcases, board games. Dogs welcome indoors. Springfield pub crawl neighbor.
breweries.food: BYOF — grab food from Strings down the street
breweries.events: Community hangouts, game nights
breweries.tap_highlights: Rotating craft selection in a cozy setting

breweries.name: Bottlenose Brewing
breweries.known_for: Brewery and pizza kitchen. Handcrafted stone-oven pizzas with house-made dough. Bavarian pretzels with beer cheese.
breweries.food: Full kitchen — stone-oven pizza, craft burgers, jumbo wings, Bavarian pretzels
breweries.events: Pizza and beer pairing events, seasonal releases
breweries.tap_highlights: House-brewed craft beers paired with fresh pizza

breweries.name: Kanine Social
breweries.known_for: Dog park + craft beer bar combo. 15 local/regional craft beers, kombucha, nitro cold brew. Indoor/outdoor dog park. Also at The Block Jax.
breweries.food: Coffee bar, light snacks
breweries.events: Dog socials, pup-friendly events
breweries.tap_highlights: 15 rotating local/regional craft beers, kombucha, nitro cold brew

breweries.name: Jacksonville Brewing Co. (The Phoenix)
breweries.known_for: Brewery + entertainment complex with 12 bowling lanes, 3 full bars, pizza kitchen, games, and open-air patio.
breweries.food: Pizza kitchen on-site
breweries.events: Bowling leagues, game nights, live entertainment
breweries.tap_highlights: House-brewed beers alongside full bar

breweries.name: Town Beer Co.
breweries.known_for: Craft beer shop + tasting bar showcasing Jacksonville-made beer. Natural wine, sandwiches. Murray Hill neighborhood gem.
breweries.food: Sandwiches and light fare
breweries.events: Local brewery features, tasting events
breweries.tap_highlights: Rotating local Jax beers on draft, curated bottle selection

breweries.name: Amelia Island Brewing Co.
breweries.known_for: Two Centre St storefronts — The Tavern (full kitchen) and The Alley (light fare). Southern comfort food paired with house beers.
breweries.food: Full kitchen — southern comfort food, appetizers, light fare at The Alley
breweries.events: Downtown Fernandina events, live music
breweries.tap_highlights: House-brewed beers, signature cocktails

breweries.name: First Love Brewing
breweries.known_for: Amelia Island's favorite brewery. Artisan pizza from a Cuppone oven. Smash burgers, Caesar salads, wings.
breweries.food: Full menu — artisan pizza (Cuppone oven), smash burgers, wings, salads
breweries.events: Community events, seasonal releases
breweries.tap_highlights: Craft beers designed to pair with their pizza

breweries.name: Mocama Beer Company
breweries.known_for: Founded by four friends in a former motor company building. Also has a coffee and bagel shop inside. Great taproom atmosphere.
breweries.food: No kitchen — food trucks sometimes, delivery welcome. Coffee & bagels on-site.
breweries.events: Community gatherings, beer releases
breweries.tap_highlights: Diverse craft beer lineup, coffee & bagels

breweries.name: Dog Rose Brewing Co.
breweries.known_for: In historic Lincolnville, blocks from downtown St. Augustine. Opened 2017. Wines, sodas, snacks. Food trucks available.
breweries.food: Light snacks; food trucks on rotation
breweries.events: Community events, food truck nights
breweries.tap_highlights: House-brewed beers, wines, craft sodas

breweries.name: Bog Brewing Company
breweries.address: 218 W King St, St. Augustine, FL 32084
breweries.known_for: St. Augustine staple. Brewed on-premise — lagers, hazy IPAs, West Coast IPAs, sours, Belgians. Tacos My Blessing food truck out back Mon-Sat.
breweries.food: No kitchen — BYOF welcome. Tacos My Blessing food truck Mon-Sat.
breweries.events: Live music, community events, seasonal beer releases
breweries.tap_highlights: Lagers, hazy IPAs, West Coast IPAs, sours, Belgian ales
